basic_details.job_title: NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education adnd Research Bhubaneshwar (NISER)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) has published the Scientific Administrative Assistant Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. NISER/R&D/CS2604/19/2026-27 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Scientific Administrative Assistant positions. Candidates up to 50 years of age holding a Graduate Degree in any discipline with a minimum CGPA of 8.5 or at least 80% marks are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: For Scientific Administrative Assistant: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in Any Discipline with Min CGPA 8.5 or above or Minimum percentage 80% or above.
qualification.details: Scientific Administrative Assistant: Graduate Degree in Any Discipline Min CGPA is 8.5 or above or Minimum percentage is 80% or above in Graduation Experience with web development (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.national_institute_of_science_education_: Graduate Degree in Any Discipline with Min CGPA 8.5 or above or Minimum percentage 80% or above.

content_sections.heading: NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NISER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientific Administrative Assistant: Graduate Degree in Any Discipline Min CGPA is 8.5 or above or Minimum percentage is 80% or above in Graduation Experience with web development (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: For Scientific Administrative Assistant: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneshwar (NISER).

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Scientific Administrative Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Scientific Administrative Assistant?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies available for the Scientific Administrative Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for NISER Scientific Administrative Assistant?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post is scheduled for 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for Scientific Administrative Assistant will receive a consolidated fellowship of ₹24,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit to apply for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Scientific Administrative Assistant position is 50 years.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate Degree in Any Discipline with a minimum CGPA of 8.5 or 80% marks. Experience in web development is desirable.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview, meaning no prior online application is required.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Scientific Administrative Assistant at NISER?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Scientific Administrative Assistant position will be based solely on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Conference Hall, SMS Building, NISER, Bhubaneswar, Odisha.
